creator: r.c.g@gmx.de
text:
Created attachment 189597
Patch for updating the jogamp-jogl port to 2.3.2

Hi,

I wanted to run SweetHome3D (http://www.sweethome3d.com), which requires JOGL 2.3.2.
To get JOGL 2.3.2, I modified jogamp-jogl in the ports tree to update it to this version.

Just bumping the version was not sufficient as some more things had to be
adjusted.
Attached, I send a diff against the original version that shows the
modifications.

With these modifications and a somehwhat adjusted start script for SweetHome3D, I could build and install JOGL 2.3.2 and run SweetHome3D.

Just in case, I also include the modified start script for SweetHome3D.

I hope this is helpful.
If there are any questions or comments, please let me know.



Thank you and best regards,

Ruediger
